top_signals.title: Exclusive: EQT to announce Emirates GBR SailGP deal
top_signals.summary: European private equity giant EQT will today partner with Sir Ben Ainslie’s SailGP team Emirates GBR ahead of this weekend’s British leg of the series. The Swedish global investment firm – with £250bn in assets under management – has agreed a deal to be Emirates GBR’s private markets partner until the end of the decade. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
